title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs on desktop computers and automates daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and other applications. Available in Pro and Max plans, it supports task scheduling and workflow automation with real-world use cases including file organization and email summarization.
